chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No.3461 of 2019 ______________________________________________________________ Order with signature of Judge For further orders. Dated: 01.02.2021 Petitioner present in person. Mr. Iqbal Khurram for KMC. -.-.- In pursuance of order dated 03.10.2019 Karachi Metropolitan Corporation while considering the appeal of the petitioner came to the conclusion that petitioner is far below as far as seniority list is concerned and does not fulfill the required qualification/criteria, as prescribed. This being the situation the orders whereby instant petition was disposed of has been complied with. In case petitioner is aggrieved of seniority list or method of preparing such seniority list while considering the promotions, she may avail the remedy available to her under the law however this petition has served its purpose wherein scope is limited to the extent of petitioner’s entitlement for promotion to BPS-17 from BPS-16. The compliance report is taken on record subject to the above and no further orders are required to be passed in this petition. Judge Judge
